name: letters
title: Letters
description: A newsletter and essay theme: book-serif body type on cool paper white, a sealing-wax red accent, and a subscribe slot that works with any form endpoint. The signature is the archive — every essay set like a line in a book's table of contents, numbered, dot-leadered out to its date.

tokens.--font-serif: everything typeset: body, headings, the site title
tokens.--text-s: small text: dates, meta lines, footer
tokens.--text-m: base body size (generous, for long reading)
tokens.--text-xl: the site title and large headings
tokens.--tracking-caps: letter spacing for uppercase meta lines
tokens.--color-wax: the sealing-wax red: links, the drop cap, the end mark, the subscribe button
tokens.--color-on-wax: text placed on the wax red
tokens.--color-leader: the dot leaders in the archive (decorative)
tokens.--toc-gutter: width of the essay-number column in the archive
tokens.--radius: corner rounding for images, code, and form fields
